outcome_summary: Phase 5 political-philosophy seed (P5-05) lands at S-0061 — first political-philosophy migration; closes the political-philosophy subdomain. 28 nodes + 34 edges across four clusters: foundation umbrella political_philosophy (1); theories of justice (8) covering justice (Aristotelian distributive/corrective/procedural), distributive_justice (Rawls/Nozick patterned-vs-historical contrast), justice_as_fairness (Rawls 1971 original position; difference principle), libertarianism_political (Nozick 1974 entitlement; Wilt Chamberlain), communitarianism (MacIntyre/Sandel/Walzer/Taylor unencumbered-self critique), capability_approach (Sen/Nussbaum), luck_egalitarianism (Cohen/Arneson/Dworkin choice/circumstance; Anderson 1999 critique), desert_theory_political (Miller 1999 partial-revival); state/authority/legitimacy (6) covering state_political (Weber territorial-monopoly), sovereignty (Bodin/Hobbes/Westphalia), political_authority (Raz service-conception; Wolff anarchist challenge), political_legitimacy (consent/fair-play/democratic/instrumental), social_contract_theory (Hobbes/Locke/Rousseau/Rawls), political_obligation (consent/fair-play/gratitude/natural-duty/associative; philosophical-anarchist denial); liberty/equality/rights (7) covering liberty_political (Berlin negative-vs-positive; Pettit republican alternative), equality_political (formal/opportunity/outcome/relational; Anderson; leveling-down), human_rights (UDHR; Griffin moral vs Rawls/Beitz political conceptions), natural_rights (Lockean; Bentham critique), positive_rights (ICESCR; Marshall lineage), negative_rights (ICCPR), toleration (Locke/Mill/Rawls public reason; Popper paradox); government/ideologies (6) covering democracy (intrinsic/instrumental/epistemic; Estlund; Brennan epistocratic challenge), liberalism (classical/egalitarian/political-liberal), republicanism (Pettit non-domination), conservatism (Burke/Oakeshott), socialism (Marx/Cohen; market-socialist Roemer), multiculturalism (Kymlicka/Taylor/Honneth/Fraser/Okin minorities-within-minorities). 5-tier layered DAG; 28/28 INTERPRETED; within-domain edges only. graph_version 8→9. Migration applied via chunked execute_sql (UPDATE settings; INSERT 15 nodes; INSERT 13 nodes; INSERT 34 edges) + apply_migration marker (no-op SELECT 1 body) recording the migration name in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations. Pre-apply awk-grep escape sweep clean. Live verification 216/274 (delta +28/+34 from S-0059's 188/240). check_target.py P5-05 PASS both criteria; validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 210 soft-warns (207 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C; 3 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace + 1 routine-collision). Two-commit pattern continued. 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0101-0109 left reserved. **Routine lifecycle-push wrapper exercised end-to-end**: this is the first routine fire post-S-0060 — all three lifecycle pushes (eager-claim, deliverable, close) succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py from routine context with the harness Default Branch Push gate not firing. T1-A in routine_lifecycle_push_first_exercise.md closed by clean exercise. Forward state: P5-05 complete; political-philosophy subdomain fully seeded. Phase 5 progress: 8/16 tasks complete; 8 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C. Next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-06 Aesthetics in walk order.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was ~28 nodes / ~34 edges across the four political-philosophy clusters (foundation/justice/state-authority-legitimacy/liberty-equality-rights/government-ideologies); delivered exactly 28 nodes and 34 edges, both inside the declared range and matching the cluster decomposition (1 foundation + 8 justice + 6 state-authority + 7 liberty-rights + 6 government-ideologies = 28). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended. Migration applied to paideia-dev via chunked execute_sql + apply_migration marker (whole-body apply_migration was infeasible due to MCP call payload size); final live count 216 nodes / 274 edges (delta +28/+34 matches the migration). graph_version 8→9 honored. confidence_level distribution 28/28 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Pre-apply awk-grep SQL escape-bug sweep across non-comment lines clean. check_target.py --task-id P5-05 passes both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 210 soft-warns (207 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape with 216 total nodes; 3 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 1 from in-band routine activity). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim + deliverable + close). Sub-range slots 0101-0109 left reserved. Lifecycle-push wrapper exercised end-to-end: all three lifecycle pushes (eager-claim, deliverable, close) succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py — confirms the ADR 0054 subprocess-bypass hypothesis; T1-A in routine_lifecycle_push_first_exercise.md closed.
